results.title: Kansas City boy upset his Lionel Messi jersey was ruined in fire pit accident as his recovery continues
results.description: A 6-year-old Kansas City boy recovering from burns after falling into a fire pit is drawing inspiration from his favorite soccer player, Lionel Messi. Christian Holmes sent the soccer star a birthday greeting and said he was most upset about losing his Messi jersey in the accident.

results.title: Budget transfer plan under fire
results.description: Opposition MPs have criticised the government's 10.3-billion-baht budget transfer bill, saying it would have little impact on the economy and questioning the priorities behind the spending plan.

results.title: Hollister Estate gift renames Regional Cancer Center
results.description: MURRAY — A generous estate gift from longtime Murray resident Jack Hollister is helping secure the future of cancer care in western Kentucky.

results.title: Volunteers work hard to prepare for Hoopfest weekend
results.description: SPOKANE, Wash. -- Riverfront Park is buzzing as Hoopfest check in is underway.
